title: Preview of Linked Board Item - Card - When clicked does NOT lead me to the actual item in the board. ITEM ID Preview for connected boards.

posts.author: jonasf (Jonas Fürstenberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I have two board connected, and I have a Preview of the Item like Follows:

mondy-tradefair940×520 43.8 KB

And I Click on the BOARD, in this case “Trade Fair Phase 2 - 2024”.
I would expect the system to automatically highlight the item by changing the background color slightly and by finding me the item in that list so that I don’t have to scroll around or search again, when I come from a linked Board with a linked Item.
